definition: Total interest cost incurred on funding sources attributable to the reporting unit during the period. At facility level, computed as the product of the committed amount, the bank's participation share, and the cost of funds rate. At higher rollup levels, aggregated as the sum of facility-level interest expense.
generic_formula:
For each active facility:
1. Look up the total funded amount from position details
2. Adjust for the bank’s ownership share (bank_share_pct; defaults to 100% if not set)
3. Multiply by the cost-of-funds rate (if unavailable, derive it as all-in rate minus credit spread)
Result = Funded Amount × Bank Share % × Cost of Funds Rate
insight: Funding cost burden reveals margin compression risk — rising interest expense relative to committed amounts signals tightening spreads or increased leverage.

ingredient_fields.description: Total committed amount of the facility
Bank's participation share of the facility (%)
Cost of funds rate (may be NULL; derived from all_in_rate - spread)
All-in interest rate for fallback derivation
Spread in basis points for fallback derivation

level_definitions.level_logic:
1. Start with all positions as of the reporting date
2. Look up the funded amount from position details
3. Match each position to its active facility
4. Look up the bank’s ownership share (defaults to 100% if not set)
5. Look up the cost-of-funds rate from pricing (if unavailable, derive as all-in rate minus spread)
6. Result = Funded Amount × Bank Share % × Cost of Funds Rate

source_references.description: Bank's participation share of the facility (%)
FTP / internal transfer price. Fallback: all_in_rate_pct - spread_bps/100
All-in interest rate for fallback derivation
Credit spread in basis points for fallback derivation

level_definitions.level_logic:
1. Compute Interest Expense at facility level (see above)
2. Group facilities by counterparty
3. Weight each facility’s value by the counterparty’s participation share (defaults to 100%)
4. Result = Sum of (Facility Interest Expense × Participation %)

source_references.description: Bank's participation share of the facility (%)

Credit spread in basis points for fallback derivation

level_definitions.level_logic:
1. Compute Interest Expense at facility level
2. Map each facility to its desk via business segment hierarchy
3. Result = Sum of all facility-level Interest Expense within the desk

3. Result = Sum of all facility-level Interest Expense within the portfolio

definition: Total approved committed credit amount in USD representing contractual lending capacity.
generic_formula:
For each active facility:
1. Take the total committed amount from the facility record
2. Adjust for the bank’s ownership share (bank_share_pct; defaults to 100% if not set)
Result = Committed Amount × Bank Share %

level_definitions.level_logic:

2. Look up the bank’s ownership share (defaults to 100% if not set)
3. Result = Committed Amount × Bank Share %

4. Result = Sum of (Facility Committed Exposure × Participation %)

definition: Committed but not yet drawn portion of credit exposure in USD. Reflects contingent funding risk.

2. Adjust for the bank’s ownership share (bank_share_pct; defaults to 100% if not set)
Result = Unfunded Amount × Bank Share %

definition: Total interest earned on outstanding exposures during the reporting period.
generic_formula:
For each active facility as of the reporting date:
1. Look up the interest income amount from the profitability snapshot
2. Adjust for the bank’s ownership share (bank_share_pct; defaults to 100% if not set)
Result = Interest Income Amount × Bank Share %
insight: Core revenue generation from lending activities

level_definitions.level_logic:

4. Result = Interest Income Amount × Bank Share %
